title: coelogyne tiongiana
intro: Coelogyne tiongiana, also known as the Borneo Coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to the island of Borneo in Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Coelogyne tiongiana include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it a useful remedy for various ailments. In traditional medicine, Coelogyne tiongiana is prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its roots and flowers in water, and is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and extracts.
